elements.name: landscape image - traditional Chinese imperial palace
data: Picture: Illustrated depiction of a traditional Chinese imperial palace, likely the Forbidden City, featuring golden rooftops, red walls, green trim, and symmetrical staircases on a white background.

elements.name: square image - Chinese pagoda icon
data: Icon: Illustrated orange and gold multi-tiered Chinese pagoda tower with decorative rooflines, teal accents, and a spire on a white background.

elements.name: portrait image - traditional Chinese pagoda illustration
data: Picture: Digital illustration of a traditional Chinese pagoda tower in orange and gold tones, featuring multiple tiered roofs, decorative details, and a winding path at the base, set against a white background.

elements.name: landscape image - colorful mountain peaks illustration
data: Picture: Colorful abstract illustration of mountain peaks with layered contour lines in shades of blue, green, and yellow, suggesting a topographic or stylized landscape design.

elements.name: decorative icon - swirling cloud
data: Icon: Stylized illustration of a swirling cloud or smoke in warm orange and peach tones, with a curling tail at the bottom, rendered in a simple, flat design style.

elements.name: background image - soft warm abstract
data: Background: Soft, warm-toned abstract background with subtle curved shapes in peach and orange hues, primarily white with decorative elements in the lower center and right corner.

elements.name: decorative image - swirling clouds East Asian motif
data: Picture: A stylized illustration of swirling clouds in soft orange and peach tones, with a decorative, flowing design reminiscent of traditional East Asian artistic motifs.

elements.name: decorative icon - Temple of Heaven
data: Icon: Stylized illustration of the Temple of Heaven in Beijing, China, featuring its iconic multi-tiered circular structure with blue roofs and orange accents on a white background.

elements.name: background image - golden Asian cloud motifs
data: Background: Decorative golden/peach-toned traditional Asian cloud motifs on a white background, featuring swirling, layered cloud designs in a classic Chinese or Japanese artistic style.
